title: French Ham and Puff Pastry Mille-Feuille
description: A classic French dessert made with layers of puff pastry, ham, and creamy filling, topped with a crunchy mille-feuille. Perfect for a sweet treat or a unique dinner option.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry sheet to a large rectangle.
Place a slice of ham on each square, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the pastry over the ham to form a triangle, pressing edges to seal.
Brush tops with egg wash and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Cut the puffy pastry into thin strips and sprinkle with crunchy pastry crumbs.
Assemble the mille-feuille by layering a pastry square, a dollop of cream, and a sprinkle of chocolate.
Repeat for 3-4 layers, finishing with a pastry square on top.
Garnish with additional puffy pastry strips and crunchy pastry crumbs.
